title: juncus rupestris
intro: Juncus rupestris, also known as Alpine Rush or Rock Joint-grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The health benefits of Juncus rupestris include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, Juncus rupestris is typically used as a dried root or leaf infusion, and can be consumed as a tea or used topically as a poultice to aid in wound healing.
